title: Decontrasted
description: This pack decontrasts all of the original textures for a console edition feel
body:
![Utility Blocks](https://imgur.com/kPgaSFb.png)

It changes everything yet almost nothing

I wouldn't be surprised if it didn't get very many downloads

But I hope those who do download it enjoy it

This pack de-contrasts every texture in the game

It was mainly made to give a nostalgic feel for those who played on console editions

If you like this pack, you can follow me on:

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pekitp/projects)

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/PekitP)

[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pekitp/)
